👋 Thanks for submitting your project!

Estimated time: 5-10 minutes
-->

## 📋 Project Information

**Project Name**: 
<!-- A clear, descriptive name for your project -->

**Repository URL**: 
<!-- Link to your public GitHub repository or code hosting platform -->

**Live Demo URL**: 
<!-- If available, provide a link to a working demo (highly encouraged!) -->

**Project Type**: 
<!-- Select the category that best fits your project -->
- [ ] 🌐 Web Application (full-stack web apps)
- [ ] 🛠️ Tool / Utility (developer tools, CLI apps)
- [ ] 🤖 AI / Machine Learning (AI/ML projects)
- [ ] 📦 Open Source Library (reusable libraries/frameworks)
- [ ] 📚 Learning Resource (tutorials, guides, courses)
- [ ] 🎨 Other (games, mobile apps, IoT, etc.)

- What makes it unique or interesting?

Aim for 2-3 paragraphs (200-400 words)
-->

## 🎯 Project Status

<!-- Where is your project currently at? -->
- [ ] 💭 Concept / Idea stage
- [ ] 🔨 In Development
- [ ] ✅ MVP (Minimum Viable Product)
- [ ] 🚀 Production Ready

---

## ✅ Checklist

Before submitting, please confirm:

- [ ] My project uses TRAE as a core collaboration tool
- [ ] My project demonstrates meaningful collaboration
- [ ] My project is accessible (public repo or demo)
- [ ] I have provided basic documentation or README
- [ ] All information above is accurate and complete
- [ ] I have included screenshots or a demo (if possible)

---

## 📬 What Happens Next?

After you submit:

1. ✅ **Acknowledgment** (within 24 hours) - We'll confirm receipt
2. 🔍 **Review** (3-5 business days) - Our team will evaluate your project
3. 💬 **Feedback** (if needed) - We may ask for clarifications
4. 🎉 **Showcase** - Once approved, your project will be featured!

---

## 🙋 Need Help?

If you have questions or need assistance:
- Check our [Contribution Guidelines](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- Ask in [GitHub Discussions](../../discussions)
- Join our [Discord Community](https://discord.gg/trae)

**Thanks for sharing your project with the community! 🎉**
